0 0

Output
0 XNOR72 = XNOR(0,1) = 0
1 NOT3 = NOT(1) = 0
2 OR-NOT04 = OR(0,NOT(1)) = 0
3 OR-NOT15 = OR(1,NOT(1)) = 1
